skills.name: Resentment
skills.description: Increases attack when you have recoverable damage (the red portion of your health gauge).

levels.description: While active, grants attack +5.
While active, grants attack +10.
While active, grants attack +15.
While active, grants attack +20.
While active, grants attack +25.

skills.name: Mushroomancer
skills.description: Lets you digest mushrooms that would otherwise be inedible and gain their advantageous effects.

levels.description: Lets you digest blue mushrooms and toadstools.
Additionally lets you digest nitroshrooms and parashrooms.
Additionally lets you digest mandragoras, devil's blight, and exciteshrooms.
Slightly increases item use speed.
Moderately increases item use speed.
Greatly increases item use speed.

skills.name: Offensive Guard
skills.description: Temporarily increases attack power after executing a perfectly-timed guard.

levels.description: While active, increases attack power by 5%.
While active, increases attack power by 10%.
While active, increases attack power by 15%.
